title: Whale to be removed from Danish island after failed German rescue
summary_full: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.
summary_public: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.
